title: 9 Pounded Big-Cap Nasdaq Stocks Can Still Make You Money
text: It's been a brutal third-quarter earnings season for most big Nasdaq stocks — with disappointments all around. The post 9 Pounded Big-Cap Nasdaq Stocks Can Still Make You Money appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Smart Metering Platform Available on 32-bit MCU Product Family Equipped with an MPL460 PLC Modem
text: Microchip's PIC32CXMT provides maximum flexibility with three tiered devices including a single core, dual core and system-on-chip (SOC) to streamline smart meter and communications infrastructure development Microchip's PIC32CXMT provides maximum flexibility with three tiered devices including a single core, dual core and system-on-chip (SOC) to streamline smart meter and communications infrastructure development
